purpose_context: The architectural ratchet allowlists in tests/architectural/ have accumulated exception entries that no longer hold: symbols deleted, shims dead, contract files removed. This mission removes the evidence-backed stale entries across four categories (slice-F deferred, grandfathered legacy, legacy-contract, pure-shim adapters), fixes a dead-symbol-gate parser bug that was masking the slice-F entries, and corrects drift in the tracking issue — so the gate keeps eroding architectural debt instead of silently ratcheting it up.
purpose_tldr: Burn down stale architectural-ratchet exception allowlist entries, restoring the SHRINK gate's downward trend.
